Node.description: Plugin to set values of POS specific paramters.

PropertyString.name: eui
PropertyString.description: 64 bit Base value of EUI for IPv6 addresses. Used to creat link local address. RFC 2373 Appendix A has more information.

PropertyString.name: incrementBy
PropertyString.description: 64 bit Increment used to add upto the base value to get EUI for a given IP address. The nth IP address wil have baseEUI + n*incrementBy as value.

PropertyString.name: payLoadType
PropertyString.description: The type of payload to use. PPP payload needs additional paramters to configure.

PropertyString.name: address
PropertyString.description: Address(hexadecimal) for the payLoad. Used only when payload type is "kOther".

PropertyString.name: control
PropertyString.description: Control(hexadecimal) for the payLoad. Used only when payload type is "kOther".

PropertyNode.name: payLoad
PropertyNode.description: The node to be used for PayLoad. Value is null for all except PPP. PPP will use PPPPayLoad.
